claim_boundary.summary: This manifest only supports G005 completion when completion_ready=true and validate_g005_aux_completion.py passes.

training_policy.namespace_rule: All selected aux examples stay under outputs/aux/<dataset_id>/... and use source-specific action heads before D2E finetuning.

aux_sources.d2e_heldout_overlap_basis: selected auxiliary source is external to D2E and stored under a source-specific outputs/aux namespace
